CMKPipeCreateImage.description: Prepares image, mask, and prompt for image generation.
features: Accepts the prompt and an optional LoRA stack
CMKPipeCreateImage.placementNote: Place as the starting module before ControlNet or the first KSampler.

CMKCheckpointVAELoaderPipe.description: Selects the image model and matching image decoder.
features: Provides the model for a sampler or refiner
CMKCheckpointVAELoaderPipe.placementNote: Place before the KSampler or Refiner and connect MODEL to its MODEL input.

CMKLoadImage.description: Loads an image into the flow without modifying it.
CMKLoadImage.placementNote: Place before a module that processes an existing image.

CMKImageLoadAndResizePipe.description: Loads an image and optionally adjusts it to the working size.
features: Prepare size and orientation for the flow
CMKImageLoadAndResizePipe.placementNote: Place at the beginning of an image-based flow before Create Image or a processing module.

CMKSwapImageLoaderPipe.description: Loads target and source images for FaceSwap.

CMKControlNetPreparePipe.description: Optionally adds image guidance for the following generation step.
features: Uses composition or contours of an image as guidance
CMKControlNetPreparePipe.placementNote: Place between Create Image and the first KSampler. Omit it when no image guidance is needed.

CMK_SaveProjectImage.description: Saves the finished image with a project name and optional date folder.
features: Saves the result at the end of processing
CMK_SaveProjectImage.placementNote: Place after the desired image processing as the final module.

CMK Flow · 02 LoRA Stack.description: Combines multiple LoRAs into a clear stack for the following flow.
features: Prepare the prompt for the flow
CMK Flow · 02 LoRA Stack.placementNote: Place before Create Image when one or more LoRAs are used.

CMK Flow · 10 KSampler 1st Pass.description: Creates the first image pass from the prepared CMK process.

features.title: Run the first sampling pass
features.description: Runs the first image pass from the prepared CMK PROCESS.

features.title: Control CFG and scheduler
features.description: Applies CFG, scheduler, and additional sampler parameters.

features.title: Seed management
features.description: Manages and reproduces the seed for consistent results.

features.title: Process prompt and conditioning
features.description: Processes the prompt, negative prompt, and conditioning.

features.title: LoRA integration
features.description: Integrates LoRAs seamlessly into the sampling process.

CMK Flow · 10 KSampler 1st Pass.placementNote: Place after Create Image and optional ControlNet. Connect the selected model to MODEL.
CMK Flow · 10 KSampler 1st Pass.dependencyNote: Connect SAMPLED to the Refiner input with the same name.

featureCallout.title: Supports both Text2Image and Inpaint
featureCallout.text: A single sampler module for both processes – works with any compatible SDXL checkpoint. No specialized checkpoints required.

CMK Flow · 20 Refiner.description: Refines the first pass in a separate refinement step.
CMK Flow · 20 Refiner.placementNote: Place directly after the first KSampler. Image enhancement modules can follow.
CMK Flow · 20 Refiner.dependencyNote: SAMPLED, MODEL, and PROCESS come from the corresponding outputs of the preceding modules.

CMK Flow · 30 Detailer.description: Adds a curated detailer step for targeted image enhancement.
features: Enable or skip the module centrally
Return the result directly to CMK Flow
CMK Flow · 30 Detailer.placementNote: Place after KSampler or Refiner and before FaceSwap, FaceProcess, or the finish.

CMK Flow · 30 Detailer · Advanced.description: Combines two separately configured Detailer branches and returns their processed areas to the flow.
features: Use one shared log and final flow boundary
CMK Flow · 30 Detailer · Advanced.placementNote: Place after KSampler or Refiner for two different detail tasks.
CMK Flow · 30 Detailer · Advanced.dependencyNote: Each branch needs a suitable detector model for its intended image area.

CMK Flow · 40 FaceSwap.description: Runs FaceSwap inside the CMK Flow pipeline.
features: Enable or skip the module centrally
CMK Flow · 40 FaceSwap.placementNote: Place after image generation or the Refiner.

CMK Flow · 40 FaceSwap · Advanced.description: Processes up to three target persons in separate FaceSwap branches and returns the combined result to the flow.
features: Three branches for left, center, and right target persons
Use one shared log and final flow boundary
CMK Flow · 40 FaceSwap · Advanced.placementNote: Place after image generation or the Refiner for images with up to three target persons.
CMK Flow · 40 FaceSwap · Advanced.dependencyNote: Select a separate source image for every FaceSwap branch in use.

CMK Flow · 50 FaceProcess.description: Prepares a detected face for further processing in the flow.
features: Enable or skip the module centrally
Return the result directly to CMK Flow
CMK Flow · 50 FaceProcess.placementNote: Place after Refiner, Detailer, or FaceSwap and before final saving.

CMK Flow · 50 FaceProcess · Advanced.description: Processes up to three target persons in separate FaceProcess branches and returns the combined result to the flow.
features: Configure up to three FaceProcess branches independently
Use one shared log and final flow boundary
CMK Flow · 50 FaceProcess · Advanced.placementNote: Place after Refiner, Detailer, or FaceSwap for images with up to three target persons.
CMK Flow · 50 FaceProcess · Advanced.dependencyNote: Each branch independently selects its target face and processing mode.

CMK Flow · 90 Upscale & Save.description: Upscales the finished image and provides the saving finish of CMK Flow.
features: Save the image as the final flow step
CMK Flow · 90 Upscale & Save.placementNote: Place as the final module of CMK Flow.

toolbox.CMKPreviewBoard: Combines up to 32 CMK diagnostics into one visual overview and places multiple processing stages directly beside each other.
toolbox.CMKPreviewRender: Turns one CMK diagnostic into a complete visual process view with intermediate images, captions, and the decisive settings.
toolbox.CMKSummary: Condenses a CMK diagnostic into a clear summary of the processing performed, its settings, and its result.
toolbox.CMKLogCreate: Creates an empty CMK log pipe for structured workflow messages.
toolbox.CMKLogSetBlock: Adds a named and sortable text block to a CMK log pipe.
toolbox.CMKLogConcat: Combines up to 32 log blocks in an existing CMK log pipe.
toolbox.CMKLogExportText: Sorts a CMK log pipe and exports its complete content as readable text.
toolbox.CMK_ImageMetrics: Reads image dimensions, batch size, and channels and also provides them as a CMK diagnostic.
toolbox.CMK_ImageQuickMetrics: Shows key image and tensor values directly in the node and passes the image through unchanged.
